'''Adega Besh''', also known as '''Adega II''', was a [[Binary star/Legends|binary star]] at the heart of the [[Adega system/Legends|Adega system]]. Its binary partner was [[Adega Prime]]. The stars' most notable [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] body was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].

{{Star-stub}}
